cards.name: AUTH-1 – Register user (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can register with email and password

Create a Users document on signup. Store name, email (hashed pw), and empty trade history.

cards.name: AUTH-2 – Login (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can log in and stay authenticated

Session token or JWT. Link to uploaded plants and swap history on login.

cards.name: LIST-1 – Create plant listing (3 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can list a plant with photo, name, and location

Upload image → store as URL. Add name, select level (1–3), attach GPS coordinates. Creates a Plants document.

cards.name: LIST-2 – Edit my plants (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can view and edit my listed plants

Profile page shows all user's plants. Allow update or delete of own listings.

cards.name: LIST-3 – Set plant level (1 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can set a plant level (1–3)

Level indicates rarity or difficulty. Shown on pin and plant card. Used for future matching logic.

cards.name: MAP-1 – Map with pins (3 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I see a Leaflet.js map with plant pins

Render a neighborhood map. Each active plant is a pin at its stored coordinates.

cards.name: MAP-2 – Pin → plant card (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, clicking a pin shows the plant card

Popup or side panel with photo, name, owner, and level.

cards.name: MAP-3 – Real-time map (3 SP)
cards.desc:
Map updates in real-time when new plants are added

No full reload required. Implement via polling or websocket.

cards.name: SWAP-1 – Send request (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As User A, I can send a swap request from a plant card

Creates a Trades document with status: pending.

cards.name: SWAP-2 – Notification (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As User B, I receive a notification about an incoming request

In-app notification and profile badge.

cards.name: SWAP-3 – Approve/decline (3 SP)
cards.desc:
As User B, I can approve or decline a swap request

Approve → meeting UI. Decline → rejected.

cards.name: SWAP-4 – Complete swap (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can mark a swap as completed

Updates history and listing.

cards.name: SWAP-5 – Swap history (2 SP)
cards.desc:
As a user, I can view my swap history

Profile shows past trades.

cards.name: BE-1 – Plants schema (2 SP)
cards.desc:
Set up Plants collection

Schema: name, image-URL, level, coordinates, ownerUserId, createdAt.

cards.name: BE-2 – Trades schema (2 SP)
cards.desc:
Set up Trades collection

Schema: plantId, userAId, userBId, status, meetingDetails.

cards.name: BE-3 – Users schema (2 SP)
cards.desc:
Set up Users collection

Schema: name, email, passwordHash, relations.
